svg.text: Model 3 — TOSICA: Transformer with Pathway-Masked Embedding
E = einsum('bg, egp → bep', x, W̃)
tokens = tokens + pos_embed → permute → (4, 4 tokens, 48 dim)
Q = Z Wᵠ K = Z Wᵊ V = Z Wᵥ per head h, dₕ = d/H
↓ attention weights reveal which pathways matter for each token
FFN(z) = GELU(z W₁ + b₁) W₂ + b₂ dim_ff = 4d = 192
Z' = Z + MHA(LN(Z)) Z'' = Z' + FFN(LN(Z'))
Example: 3 pathways × 4 genes each. Full model: up to 300 Reactome pathways, embed_dim ∈ {32, 48, 64}.
